workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Just came out of whitespace analysis with Northwind Traders. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-21 15:57 EST
Subject: Follow-up: whitespace analysis Review

Our team encountered some challenges with whitespace analysis. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 08:29 EST
Subject: whitespace analysis - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with whitespace analysis. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-01 16:55 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Northwind Traders whitespace analysis

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about whitespace analysis. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Northwind Traders: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct whitespace analysis decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
